PQC Suite B SLH-DSA-BLAKE3 Test Vectors

Source: https://github.com/PQC-Suite-B/signatures
Commit: b392fe82d2d9770142477a576a758a233888bc0a (2025-11-07)
License: Apache-2.0 OR MIT (dual-licensed)
Authors: JP Aumasson, Zooko Wilcox-O'Hearn, Alex Pruden (Trail of Bits)

Files:
  blake3_keygen.json  - Key generation vectors (60 tests, all 6 BLAKE3 param sets)
  blake3_sig.json     - Signature generation vectors (48 tests, deterministic + hedged)
  blake3_ver.json     - Signature verification vectors (84 tests, positive + 6 mutation types)

See THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES in the repository root for full license details.
